# Version 4.151.0
> **In-flight servicing update**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 ships 3 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Merge upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312))

## API Surface

- **Optimize SKColor hex parsing and add ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))

## Bug Fixes

- **Unnecessary `unsafe` modifier from GRContextOptions** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))
